## Definition of Done (doc 00 §4)

| ID | Criterion | Status | Driven By |
|---|---|---|---|
| D1 | A new image dropped into data\incoming\ can be processed to draft masks for all 56 atomic parts with one CLI command. | blocked | MF-P2-08.04 |
| D2 | Draft->human-corrected->gold flow works in CVAT with SAM2-assisted editing, and export produces a valid gold package that passes 100% of format checks. | blocked | MF-P1-07.05, MF-P1-08.04 |
| D3 | Auto-QA battery (34 checks) runs on every package and blocks bad gold automatically. | complete | MF-P1-07.01, MF-P1-07.02, MF-P1-07.03, MF-P2-07.03, MF-P2-07.04, MF-P3-06.08 |
| D4 | VLM QA reviews overlays and routes agree/disagree cases correctly on a 20-image validation set. | blocked | MF-P4-EXIT |
| D5 | ≥300 human-approved gold packages exist with full manifests, hashes, and coverage matrix ≥80% cell coverage. | blocked | MF-P7-01.01, MF-P7-01.02 |

## For AI Agents

Full command reference: `README.md` in this folder. Quick reference:
```
python tracker.py list --status open --phase P0
python tracker.py set MF-P0-01.01 --status complete --evidence "..."
python tracker.py set MF-P2-05.02 --status blocked --blocked-reason "..."
python tracker.py next -n 10
python tracker.py report
```
